description_long: A cluster of eight stylized mushrooms stands upright, each featuring a vibrant green cap adorned with large, evenly spaced white spots. The caps are rounded and dome-shaped, with smooth surfaces and slightly curved margins. The stems are slender, cylindrical, and pale purple-gray, tapering slightly toward the base and giving a whimsical, cartoon-like appearance. The mushrooms vary in height and size, with some grouped closely together and others spaced apart, creating a natural, organic arrangement. No gills are visible beneath the caps, and the overall texture appears matte with a soft, semi-smooth finish. The mushrooms are depicted without any visible substrate or environmental context, floating against a plain background.
description: A group of eight green, white-spotted mushrooms with smooth, rounded caps and slender purple-gray stems, arranged in a natural cluster. The surface is matte and the caps are dome-shaped with curved edges.
description_view_0: The mushrooms are seen from the front, showing the full height of the stems and the rounded caps with prominent white spots.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the cluster arrangement, with some stems leaning and the caps overlapping slightly.
description_view_2: From this side, the varying heights and sizes of the mushrooms are more apparent, and the curvature of the caps is emphasized.
description_view_3: The group is viewed from the opposite side, showing the backs of the caps and the arrangement of the stems in relation to each other.
